Task.title: Task
Task.description: A scheduled task or commitment with a deadline and optional subtasks.

userId.description: Foreign key reference to auth.uid of the creator

deadline.description: ISO date-time string of the deadline

subtasks.description: List of micro-actionable steps to complete

googleDriveFileId.description: Optional original Google Drive file ID

googleDriveFileName.description: Optional original Google Drive file name

calendarEventId.description: Optional locked Google Calendar event ID

suggestedScheduleTime.description: AI-proposed focus time block text representation

TabActivity.title: TabActivity
TabActivity.description: An automated active tab tracking session captured by the Chrome Extension.

userId.description: Foreign key reference to auth.uid of the user

domain.description: Domain name of the active tab (e.g., github.com)

duration.description: Duration spent on this tab in seconds

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp of the tracking entry

Habit.title: Habit
Habit.description: A tracked daily, recurring safeguard habit.

userId.description: Foreign key reference to auth.uid of the creator

title.description: Description of the consistent action required

tasks.description: Global collection mapping security access to tasks by user authentication matches

habits.description: Global collection mapping habits and routine streak counters by user authentication

tab_activities.description: Global collection mapping active tab durations tracked by the Chrome Extension
